_comment: Self-contained ADO daemon profile. Select with `CodeReviewDaemon --review mcqdb`. Everything needed to run is here — no launch env vars. Two-model split: the dispatcher/state orchestrator loop runs ReviewModelId (gpt-5.6-luna); the code-reviewer:* review sub-agents run SubAgentModelId (gpt-5.6-sol). NOTE: the absolute paths below are machine-specific (this box's sandbox-workspaces + .run dirs); adjust them if you move machines. The pool root MUST live under SandboxGateway:WorkspaceBasePath (the gateway's real host base). See ADO-ONBOARDING.md.

Ado._comment: azure-devops-mcp public client id (see LmStreaming.Sample/AuthProviderGuide.md). MSAL.NET interactive (browser + loopback + PKCE), no secret. Sign in ONCE out-of-band into the shared TokenStoreDir below; the daemon restores it at boot.

CodeReviewDaemon._ReviewedRepoSubmodules_comment: MCQdbDEV's own first-party nested submodules (the _git/<name> URL segments from its .gitmodules). Explicit allow-list, NOT a same-org wildcard: only these exact names init; an attacker-added/repointed submodule is still denied. 'getting-started' is the URL repo name for the submodule whose path is NScriptGettingStarted; 'Microsoft%20Orleans' keeps its URL-encoded space because the parsed request path is not URL-decoded.
